text.message: Sorry there were so many resources in the chat
This is hard to track lol
To make up for the Rob tho
I legit saw someone sent brick in the chat, I’m baked, I didn’t know what you were asking for when you said blue
but funny to blame me for the rob
I wasn’t I just wanted a resource back and an actual trade
Do you not see oranges setup?
we need to be careful of double play
I'm worried about the double play
blue is on 6 with three down devs
how are we leaving blue alone?
im literally building to 10 and being hit not stop
i have no road network or knights played
Black I hope you have a knight
Great i got stolen from the most
You have a lot more production
i think its red but well see if you made a mistake or not
I think it’s red too that’s why I blocked them
Yall are braindead doesnt matter anyway
The fact blue traded with orange shows
blue do you need brick for road?
No im not worried about it
And I’m not gonna trade you either
